Describe the issue linked to the documentation

In the governance page at line: https://github.com/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/blob/59dd128d4d26fff2ff197b8c1e801647a22e0158/doc/governance.rst?plain=1#L161

there is a reference attached to "Enhancement proposals (SLEPs)." 
However, after compiling, it is displayed as "a Enhancement proposals (SLEPs)" which is grammatically incorrect.
Page at: https://scikit-learn.org/stable/governance.html

### Suggest a potential alternative/fix

Fix it by updating the line with 
```
an :ref:`slep`
```","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/issues/30180/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/issues/30180/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/issues/comments/2454636141","html_url":"https://github.com/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/issues/30180#issuecomment-2454636141","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/issues/30180","id":2454636141,"node_id":"IC_kwDOAAzd1s6STsZt","user":{"login":"rajathkannabiran","id":43930076,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjQzOTMwMDc2","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/43930076?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/rajathkannabiran","html_url":"https://github.com/rajathkannabiran","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/rajathkannabiran/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/rajathkannabiran/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/rajathkannabiran/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/rajathkannabiran/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/rajathkannabiran/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/rajathkannabiran/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/rajathkannabiran/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/rajathkannabiran/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/rajathkannabiran/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2024-11-04T12:50:42Z","updated_at":"2024-11-04T12:50:42Z","author_association":"NONE","body":"I #### Reference Issues/PRs
<!--
Example: Fixes #1234. See also #3456.
Please use keywords (e.g., Fixes) to create link to the issues or pull requests
you resolved, so that they will automatically be closed when your pull request
is merged. See https://github.com/blog/1506-closing-issues-via-pull-requests
-->
Fixes #30180 and #30181


#### What does this implement/fix? Explain your changes.
Fixing a simple grammatical mistake in https://scikit-learn.org/stable/governance.html
as per Issue #30180 by @AdityaInnovates
